name: /agent-verify pipes the diff to the verifier on stdin so the verifier runs as its own process per F-3 Karpathy independent-verifier discipline
command:
printf 'this is the diff body
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
read -r line
if [ "$line" = "this is the diff body" ]; then echo "verdict: agree"; else echo "verdict: disagree"; echo "reason: did not receive diff"; fi
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>err.txt && grep -q 'verdict: agree' err.txt && echo piped 1>&2
